label: Always: attach a camera photo
description: Runs even if earlier steps failed (_always_run) — grabs a desktop/camera photo so you have visual evidence of the end state.

label: Always: attach an SSH command's output
description: Runs at the end regardless of pass/fail — captures a log over SSH (default: journalctl) and attaches it.

label: Always: attach an ADB command's output
description: Runs at the end regardless of pass/fail — captures an adb shell output (default: logcat) and attaches it.

label: Always: attach ADB logcat
description: Always-run collector that dumps logcat and attaches the full log.

label: Always: attach an ADB screenshot
description: Always-run collector that captures the device screen as evidence.

label: Always: attach a DLT file
description: Always-run collector that attaches a .dlt capture to the report (set file_path).

label: Always: download a file from the target
description: Always-run collector that pulls a log/file off the target over SSH and attaches it.
